title: Translation Elongation
summary: A second molecules/trna enters the structures/ribosome's A site with its anticodon matching the next codon on molecules/mrna. The ribosome's catalytic site (rRNA) forms a peptide bond transferring methionine onto the second tRNA's amino acid. The first (now empty) tRNA exits the E site; the ribosome shifts one codon down, moving the second tRNA from A → P site, freeing the A site for the next tRNA
